CustomField.description: Outbound (this org calls the provider — IntegrationDispatcher path) or Inbound (the provider POSTs to /deliveryhub/v1/webhook/<DeveloperName> — DeliveryWebhookReceiverApi path). Defaults to Outbound for backward compatibility with rows shipped before the inbound receiver existed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Outbound (we call them) or Inbound (they call us via /webhook/<DeveloperName>).
CustomField.label: Direction
